events.title: Master Services Agreement — fictional.pdf
events.snippet: Section 8.2 requires written notice and provides ten business days to cure after receipt.

events.title: Notice of Breach — fictional.pdf
events.snippet: The notice is dated April 3 and states delivery by overnight courier. The attached tracking page records delivery on April 4.

events.text: Search complete · 7 chunks reviewed · 2 source passages selected

The agreement requires written notice followed by a ten-business-day cure period. The fictional notice is dated April 3, and its attached tracking page records delivery on April 4. Treat April 4 as the provisional receipt date, then verify the original carrier record before calculating any procedural deadline. The source set does not establish whether a later cure communication was sent.
